name: Mushroom Bolognese
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the dried shiitake mushrooms in a small bowl and add enough warm water to cover. Let them soak for about 15 minutes, until soft.
2. Add the soaked shiitake mushrooms and button mushrooms to a food processor fitted with the metal blade. Process until finely chopped.
3. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over moderate heat. Add the shallot and garlic and sauté until tender, about 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Add the finely chopped mushrooms to the skillet and continue sautéing, stirring frequently, until all the liquid from the mushrooms has evaporated and they have just begun to brown, about 10 to 15 minutes.
5. Add the salt-free whole tomatoes (crush them with your hands) and stir in the tomato paste, sugar, dried oregano, and dried basil. Simmer until the sauce is thick but still slightly liquid, about 10 to 15 minutes.
6. Pour over cooked pasta.
